calendar.matters:
MOTION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD
Off Calendar Nov-12-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. ERIC J. BUESCHER OF THE LAW OFFICES OF COTCHETT & MCCARTHY LLP, TEL. NO. (650)697-6000 APPEARING FOR THE PETITIONER;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PETITIONER ROCKIT RECRUITING LLC'S MOTION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD is Granted. (Principal - $37,007.01) No opposition filed. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Sheryl L. Sawyer, CSR # 5976
